patterns.name: Hidden Variable Reference Conditional Rendering
patterns.description: Undefined variables referenced in conditional rendering causing inconsistent hook execution paths
symptoms: Rendered more hooks than during the previous render
Fix resistance to traditional hook dependency corrections
rootCauses: Undefined variable used in JSX conditional logic
Different render paths with varying hook counts
TypeScript compilation passes despite runtime issues
detectionSignatures: Hook count mismatch errors on specific interactions
Undefined variable in conditional JSX rendering
Error persists across dev environment resets
resistanceFactors: Logical variable naming masks the issue

solutions.description: Replace undefined variable with correct defined variable

testing: Hook count consistency across render paths
tooling: ESLint rules for undefined variables in JSX
